mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRIP ( TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_LAT, TRIP_LOT, TRIP_TAG, TRIP_CLSF, TRIP_CTPV, TRIP_GUNGU, TRIP_INQ_CNT ) VALUES ( #{tripContsId}, #{tripNm}, #{tripPathNm}, #{tripAddr}, #{tripLat}, #{tripLot}, #{tripTag}, #{tripClsf}, #{tripCtpv}, #{tripGungu}, #{tripInqCnt} )
mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_LAT, TRIP_LOT, TRIP_TAG, TRIP_CLSF, TRIP_CTPV, TRIP_GUNGU, TRIP_INQ_CNT FROM TRIP WHERE TRIP_CONTS_ID = #{tripContsId}
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_INQ_CNT FROM TRIP ORDER BY TRIP_INQ_CNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_TAG, TRIP_CTPV, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRIP_CTPV ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE) as rn FROM TRIP WHERE TRIP_CTPV IN (11, 26, 30, 31, 32) -- 예: 서울(11), 부산(26), 대전(30), 울산(31), 세종(32) 등 필요한 지역코드 ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE -- 가져온 지역들 사이에서도 순서를 랜덤하게 섞음
